summary: Shader & VFX audit: 23 shaders inventoried, 8 findings (2 FAIL_HIGH, 3 FAIL_MEDIUM, 3 FAIL_LOW). Critical: grass_wind_sway.gdshader MISSING (blocks BrocGrassWind), screen_vfx.gdshader not attached to shader material (all screen effects broken except shake). Implemented: created grass_wind_sway.gdshader (PS1 Celtic aesthetic). Generated 5 new tasks.

checklist.CHK-1: List all .gdshader files — PASS: 23 shaders in shaders/ + resources/shaders/
checklist.CHK-2: grass_wind_sway.gdshader exists — FAIL_HIGH: file MISSING, referenced in broc_grass_wind.gd:18
checklist.CHK-3: screen_vfx.gdshader attached in BrocScreenVfx — FAIL_HIGH: broc_screen_vfx.gd:46 comment says shader removed, _shader_mat never set -> all flash/vignette/glitch/desaturate effects broken (null ref)
checklist.CHK-12: card_sky + card_silhouette shaders loaded — PASS: card_scene_compositor.gd:56-57
checklist.CHK-13: _dispatch_effect private method called externally — FAIL_MEDIUM: broc_narrative_director.gd:71 calls _event_vfx._dispatch_effect() breaking encapsulation convention
checklist.CHK-14: seasonal_snow.gdshader usage — FAIL_MEDIUM: file exists with UID but not referenced in any active script
checklist.CHK-15: screen_distortion.gdshader usage — FAIL_MEDIUM: file exists but no active script references it
checklist.CHK-16: bestiole_squish.gdshader dead code — FAIL_LOW: Bestiole system removed (CLAUDE.md), shader + UID still present
checklist.CHK-17: ocean_lowpoly.gdshader usage — FAIL_LOW: shader exists, no active script references it
checklist.CHK-18: world_edge_fog.gdshader usage — PASS: exists, likely assigned to MeshInstance3D in scene; no script reference but no evidence of being broken
checklist.CHK-19: ps1_material.gdshader quality — PASS: valid spatial shader with vertex snap + UV snap
checklist.CHK-20: pixelate.gdshader quality — PASS: screen texture post-process with Sobel edge detection
checklist.CHK-21: color_dither.gdshader quality — PASS: Bayer 4x4 ordered dithering with warm parchment tint
checklist.CHK-22: crt_terminal.gdshader quality — PASS: comprehensive CRT post-process (curvature, scanlines, dithering, aberration)
checklist.CHK-23: whisper_glitch.gdshader quality — PASS: subtle SCREEN_TEXTURE glitch overlay for narrative cards

findings.message: grass_wind_sway.gdshader MISSING — BrocGrassWind loads this shader as material_overlay but file does not exist. All grass wind sway VFX absent in forest 3D walk.
findings.fix: Created shaders/grass_wind_sway.gdshader (PS1 Celtic sway, vertex quantization, height-weighted displacement)

findings.message: screen_vfx.gdshader NOT attached to ShaderMaterial. _shader_mat is never assigned. ALL _set_shader() calls are null-checked no-ops. Effects flash, flash_red, vignette, vignette_red, vignette_gold, glitch, desaturate, hue_green, hue_blue are fully broken. Only 'shake' works (uses viewport.position).
findings.fix: Blocked on director q-20260414-007 (BackBufferCopy vs SubViewport approach). Existing task VFX-SCREEN-VFX-REATTACH at P23.

findings.message: _event_vfx._dispatch_effect() calls private method (underscore prefix) from external class. GDScript convention: _ prefix = private. Should be exposed as dispatch_effect() or similar public API.
seasonal_snow.gdshader exists with .uid but not loaded anywhere. BrocSeason uses seasonal_particles.gdshader for ALL seasons. Winter blizzard mode missing dedicated snow overlay.
screen_distortion.gdshader exists but no active script references it. Likely superseded by crt_terminal.gdshader which includes distortion. Unclear if intentionally kept for future use.
bestiole_squish.gdshader dead code — Bestiole system fully removed (CLAUDE.md). Shader + .uid still present. Already tracked in VFX-DEAD-SHADER-CLEANUP (P63).
findings.fix: VFX-DEAD-SHADER-CLEANUP already in queue at P63

findings.message: ocean_lowpoly.gdshader exists but not referenced in any active script. Could be intended for a coastal biome scene but never wired.
_set_shader() silently does nothing when _shader_mat is null (no push_error/push_warning). Debugging broken VFX is invisible at runtime. Should log warning when shader is missing.

tasks_implemented.action: Created shaders/grass_wind_sway.gdshader — PS1/N64 Celtic grass sway (vertex_lighting, cull_disabled, vertex snap, height-weighted displacement, base/tip color gradient)
